name: Fired after workers comp slip claim in Sandy UT, options?

mainEntity.name: Fired after workers comp slip claim in Sandy UT, options?

acceptedAnswer.description: **File retaliation claim for reinstatement/back pay; workers' comp protects job filing.** Illegal discharge in Utah.[1] Key factors: (1) Prove causal timing; (2) Labor commission complaint; (3) Damages include lost benefits. Document all. Sue separately.
